basics.name: Seydina Ousmane NIANG
basics.label: PhD Student in Applied Mathematics
basics.summary: PhD student in applied mathematics at Université Côte d'Azur, specialising in deep probabilistic graphical models for the joint analysis of networks and continuous data. Member of the INRIA MAASAI team.

courses: Deep generative models for the joint analysis of networks and continuous data
Supervisors: Prof. Charles Bouveyron, Dr. Marco Corneli, Prof. Pierre Latouche

education.area: Mathematics and computer sciences – Artificial Intelligence

work.name: INRIA – Équipe MAASAI / Laboratoire J.A. Dieudonné
work.summary: Deep generative models for the joint analysis of networks and continuous data.
highlights: Deep latent variable models for network analysis
Variational inference and graph neural networks

work.name: Laboratoire de Mathématiques d'Orsay (LMO)
work.position: Research Intern – Deep Learning: Neural Differential Equations
work.summary: Research internship on Neural Differential Equations applied to pharmacokinetics modelling.

work.name: Université Paris-Saclay
work.summary: Study of free groups on any set X and properties of their subgroups.

teaching.name: IUT STID – Université Côte d'Azur
teaching.summary: Responsable du cours de Probabilités 1 en BUT1 (1ère année de Bachelor Universitaire de Technologie), département Statistique et Informatique Décisionnelle (STID).

teaching.name: IUT STID – Université Côte d'Azur
teaching.position: Chargé de cours – Mener des études statistiques
teaching.summary: Responsable du cours 'Mener des études statistiques' en BUT3 (3ème année de Bachelor Universitaire de Technologie), département Statistique et Informatique Décisionnelle (STID).

publications.name: The Deep Latent Position Block Model for the Clustering of Nodes in Multi-Graphs
publications.summary: Extension of the Deep-LPBM to multidimensional networks using a deep VAE with GCNs.

publications.name: The Deep Zero-Inflated Latent Position Block Model for the Clustering of Nodes in Graphs
publications.summary: Deep generative model for node clustering in sparse networks with zero-inflated structure.

publications.name: Importance Weighted Directed Graph Variational Auto-Encoder for Block Modelling of Complex Networks
publications.summary: First importance-weighted graph VAE for weighted and directed network clustering.

publications.name: Conditional Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models for the Clustering of Images
publications.publisher: JDS 2024 – 55e Journées de Statistiques de la SFdS
publications.summary: Conditional DDPM extension for image clustering via a variational EM algorithm.
